title: feuilleea rotundata
intro: Feuilleea rotundata, also known as Huang Qi or Astragalus, is a plant species that belongs to the legume family, native to China and Mongolia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its adaptogenic and immunomodulatory effects, which help to boost the immune system and enhance overall health. The health benefits of Feuilleea rotundata include reducing fatigue, improving digestion, and alleviating symptoms of respiratory infections, such as bronchitis and pneumonia. The plant is commonly used in herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and capsules, to support immune function, reduce inflammation, and promote overall well-being.
